app.title: Verdex · MoA Synthesis Engine
app.subtitle: Let multiple expert models answer in parallel, then a judge model synthesizes consensus, divergence, blind spots, and a final verdict.
app.goToSettings: ⚙️ Add models and API keys in Settings first

emptyState.samplePrompt1: Compare React, Vue, and Svelte for large enterprise applications.
emptyState.samplePrompt2: Explain quantum entanglement in 200 words and note common misconceptions.
emptyState.samplePrompt3: Assess the long-term impact of going fully remote for a 50-person startup.

chatInput.hint: Enter for newline · Ctrl/⌘+Enter to send

settingsModal.title: ⚙️ Settings
settingsModal.description: Manage global OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Any model can serve as Panel or Judge in any session.
settingsModal.emptyState: No models yet. Click "Add model" below to create your first provider.
settingsModal.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? All sessions referencing it will also be updated.
settingsModal.anthropicNote: Anthropic native protocol: uses x-api-key auth, system prompt is auto-extracted to top-level param.

templatesModal.title: 🎭 Prompt Templates
templatesModal.description: Manage global Panel role templates and Judge prompt templates. In advanced mode, sessions select from these.
templatesModal.rolePromptPlaceholder: You are a rigorous critical thinker…
templatesModal.deleteRoleConfirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? All sessions referencing it will be updated.
templatesModal.judgePromptBody: System Prompt (use {PANELS} as expert answers insertion point)
templatesModal.deletePromptConfirm: Delete prompt "{{name}}"? All sessions referencing it will be updated.

errors.PROMPT_TOO_LONG: Input too long ({{len}} chars, limit {{limit}}). Circuit breaker triggered. Please shorten or split your input.
errors.CONTEXT_TOO_LONG: Context too long ({{len}} chars total, limit {{limit}}). Circuit breaker triggered. Please start a new session.
errors.PANEL_EMPTY: No Panel models selected. Please select at least one expert.
errors.JUDGE_EMPTY: No judge models selected. Please select at least one Judge.
errors.JUDGE_NOT_FOUND: Judge model config not found. Please select a Judge in the config bar.
errors.ALL_PANELS_SKIPPED: All Panels were skipped due to context overflow. Please shorten input or switch to a model with a larger context window.

help.title: ❓ Help
help.whatIsBody: Verdex is a local Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) synthesis engine. It sends your question to multiple AI models in parallel (the Panel), then a judge model synthesizes their answers into a structured four-field verdict: consensus, divergence, blind spots, and final verdict.
help.quickStart1: Open Settings (⚙️) and add your model providers — fill in Base URL, API Key, and model name for each.
help.quickStart2: Click "🔌 Test connection" to verify each provider works (green = ok, red = error details).
help.quickStart3: Pick a mode (Simple or Advanced) and select your Panels and Judge in the config bar.
help.quickStart4: Type your question and press Ctrl/⌘+Enter to send.
help.modesSimple: Simple mode: parallel Panels answer the same prompt, then one Judge synthesizes. The original MoA flow.
help.modesAdvanced: Advanced mode: each Panel can have a role template (a system prompt that biases its perspective), and you can use single Judge or multi-Judge collision (multiple judges each produce independent verdicts, preserving disagreement).
help.templatesBody: Role templates (e.g. Critical Scrutiny, First Principles) are reusable system prompts for Panels. Judge prompt templates control how the Judge synthesizes. Manage them in 🎭 Prompt Templates. Built-in templates come in English and Chinese; your custom templates are not affected by language switching.
help.configBody: All settings (providers, API keys, templates, chat history) are stored as plaintext in: config.json inside the app data directory. You can back up or hand-edit this file.
help.shortcutsBody: Ctrl/⌘+Enter: send message. Enter: newline. Esc: close dialogs.
help.securityBody: API keys are stored in plaintext in config.json. Do not commit this file to public Git repos or sync it to untrusted cloud storage.
